title: LeoTweaks Enchantment Tweaks
description:
Gives all Enchantments their unique texture depending on type and level, including enchantment books and icons.
No Mods required.
body:
## This Resourcepack gives all Enchantments their own distinction.
 **- Unique Enchantment Colours**

 **- Unique Enchantment Icons**

 **- Unique Enchantment Book Colours**

 **- Unique Level Colours**

Once you're familiar with the pack, you'll be able to tell what Enchantment something has at just a glance!

![This image displays all the Enchantment Book categories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc2deed029a5a9d8bd9a88318e34126e305c7951.png)

Enchantment Categories:
- Swords    💖 Red
- Crossbows 🧡 Orange
- Bows      💛 Yellow
- All       💚 Green
- Misc      🩵 Cyan
- Armour    🩵 Light Blue
- Fishing   💙 Dark Blue
- Mining    💜 Purple
- Curses    ❤️ Dark Red

Levels:
- Level **I**   💚 Green
- Level **II**  💛 Yellow
- Level **III** 🧡 Orange
- Level **IV**  💖 Red
- Level **V**   ❤️ Dark Red
- Level **VI** → **X**   🩷 Pink
- Levei **11** → **255** 💜 Purple

**For futher enchantments,  use together with [LeoTweaks PVP Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-enchantments)**
